product: Databricks Assistant Agent mode is now in Public Preview
tagline: The Databricks Assistant Agent mode preview is now enabled by default for most customers.
what_it_does: The Databricks Assistant Agent mode preview is now enabled by default for most customers. The agent can automate multiple steps. From a single prompt, it can retrieve relevant assets, generate and run code, fix errors automatically, and visualize results.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: The Databricks Assistant Agent mode preview is now enabled by default for most customers. The agent can automate multiple steps.
key_takeaway: The Databricks Assistant Agent mode preview is now enabled by default for most customers.
